name: ai-bollywood-script-generator
description: Turn ordinary situations into absurd Bollywood-level drama

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.kill-ports: sh -c 'for p in 3001 5173 5174 5175; do lsof -tiTCP:$p -sTCP:LISTEN 2>/dev/null | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; done; true'
scripts.dev: npm run kill-ports && concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix server && npm run build --prefix client
